scan_scope: No final PASS is claimed before validation, commit, push, and remote equality proof.
Remote closure receipt records self-reference boundary instead of pretending post-push evidence exists pre-commit.
Custodes is limited to narrow organ matrix audit.
V0.1 checker claims structural admission only.
Known dirty state from task registration is included in file delta index.

warnings.detail: The registered Astronomicon route manifest lists eight required organs, while the taskpack manifest and post-work ring include Custodes as ninth support organ. This is treated as an admission-stage expansion, not a block.
A committed file cannot contain the final hash produced by the same commit. Final remote proof must be obtained after push without further writes.
